children.name: Fortney / Forthun Branch
children.subtitle: Norwegian Origins · Forthun Farm, Luster, Norway

children.name: Aamund Jonson Forthun
children.notes: Earliest known ancestor. Farm manager, Bnr #1. Father of Claus Aamundson.

children.name: Synneva Clausdotter
children.notes: Married Knut Aamundson Forthun in 1653, bringing Bnr #8 to the family. Key figure in establishing the Forthun farm line.

children.name: Knut Aamundson Forthun
children.notes: Married Synneva Clausdotter 1653. Brought Bnr #8 into the family.

children.name: Ole Knutson Forthun
children.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8 from 1682. Married Gjørond Sjursdotter (from Yttri) in 1679.

children.name: Torger Olson Forthun
children.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Married Britha Halvorsdatter in 1714.

children.name: Knut Torgerson Forthun
children.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Had four wives; main line continues through wife Marta Olsdotter Svalheim.

children.name: Ole Knutson Forthun
children.notes: Farm manager Bnr #8. Married Kirsti Kristensdotter Fuglesteg, 10 June 1807.

children.name: Thomas Olson Forthun
children.notes: Emigrated to America 1853. Settled in Franklin County, then Vernon County, Wisconsin. Married Susanna Johannesdotter Ottum, 13 October 1854.

children.name: Hans Thomassen Fortney
children.notes: Patriarch of the American Fortney family. Married Maria Johanna Swangstu, 6 April 1887. Moved family to Wheeler, WI in 1907. Had 10 children.

children.name: Susana Mathilda Fortney
children.notes: First child of Hans & Maria. Died January 1909 of smallpox, aged 19.

children.name: Albert Christian Fortney
children.notes: Albin's older brother. Photographed with sister Nettie — described as 'Etta and Sundance — or Bonnie and Clyde, depending on your generation.' Wife Viola Vennes: born 1892, died 1971, Withee, Wisconsin. Teacher. Remarried Franklin McMiller after Albert's death. Famously said: 'I taught all the Fortney boys and married the eldest.' Taught at Lockheil School, still visible northwest of the farm.

children.name: Marion Lucile Fortney
children.notes: Died of meningitis, aged 10.

children.name: Alan Dale Fortney
children.notes: Senior Quality Control Manager, CamCraft. Married Pamela Gerring (b. 1946, d. 2005 age 59). 2 daughters. 3 granddaughters, 1 grandson.

children.name: Kerri Fortney
children.notes: Married 1st husband, 1 daughter Samantha (age 9 in 2007), 1 son Kyle (age 7 in 2007). Also Jonathon Joseft, 1 daughter Audrey.

children.name: Virgil A. Fortney
children.notes: Married Betty Baker. Children: Philip, Robert, and Marcia Fortney. 1 granddaughter, Leslie.

children.name: Tonetta Marthia "Nettie" Fortney
children.notes: Married Rev. Frederick Dahl. Their daughter Sylvia Deason did extensive genealogical research on the Fortney line.

children.name: Adrian Hilman Dahl
children.notes: Nuclear Physicist, Professor. Visited Fortun, Norway and acquired the authoritative Luster: Gards-og aettesoge.

children.name: David Adrian Dahl
children.notes: Electrical engineer (retired), consultant for Ion Optics. Married Elizabeth 'Beth' Hunter (b. 19 June 1946, Los Angeles CA; Federal Contracts), 5 June 1966, Fort Collins, CO. 1 son, 2 adopted daughters, 1 adopted son. 1 grandson, 4 adopted grandchildren.

children.name: Steven Dahl
children.notes: Chemical engineer, BP Anchorage AK. Jaimee MacDonald also a chemical engineer, BP Anchorage.

children.name: Lanette Dahl
children.notes: Adopted. College student (as of 2007). 1 son, James.

children.name: Jessica Dahl
children.notes: Adopted. Sprint Systems Technologist. 1 son Evyn, 1 daughter Gweneth.

children.name: Benjamin Dahl
children.notes: Adopted. Growing up (as of 2007). 1 son (Aicee, adopted).

children.name: Sonje Ann Dahl Jessen
children.notes: Daughter of Adrian & Virginia Dahl. 3 sons. 2 grandsons, 2 granddaughters, 1 adopted grandchild.

children.name: Todd Arling Jessen
children.notes: 1 son André (age 7 in 2007), 1 daughter Ashley (age 5 in 2007).

children.name: Christopher Allan Jessen
children.notes: Single. Adopted daughter Mariah (age ~16 in 2007).

children.name: Brody Scott Jessen
children.notes: Age 9 months in 2007.

children.name: Monrad 'Doc' Kenneth Dahl
children.notes: Physical Therapist.

children.name: Jon Arthur Dahl
children.notes: Environmental scientist. Married Kathleen Joan 'Kate' Hiemenz Dahl (b. 20 June 1949; Registered Nurse, Environmental Program Manager), 14 August 1969, St. Cloud, MN.

children.name: Jesse Jade Dahl
children.notes: Educator — linguistics; information technologist. 1 son (Zane), 1 daughter (Lily Jade).

children.name: Jeanette 'Nettie' Leah Dahl
children.notes: Commercial Pilot, flight instructor, account manager. Died 2006. 1 son (Tyler), 1 daughter (Morgan).

children.name: Sylvia Dahl
children.notes: Later Sylvia Deason (b. 1946?). Did thorough genealogical study of the Fortney line.

children.name: Tom Kromroy
children.notes: Son of Sylvia Dahl Kromroy.

children.name: Selma Kathrina Fortney
children.notes: Married Nelmer Bergum, 5 June 1925. Nelmer Bergum: Farmer. Born 21 November 1894, died 3 March 1983, Wheeler, WI.

children.name: Stanley Nelmer Bergum
children.notes: University teacher (retired). 1 daughter, 2 sons.

children.name: Lynn Renee Bergum Kolpack
children.notes: Elementary teacher. Married Keith Kolpack (b. 20 June 1949; HS Vocational Ag teacher), 28 August 1976.

children.name: Matthew James Kolpack
children.notes: HS Technical Education teacher.

children.name: Peter Andrew Kolpack
children.notes: College student (as of 2007).

children.name: Scott Nathan Bergum
children.notes: Career US Army. Married Shari Maus Richardson (b. 16 November 1958; Secretary), 14 May 1993.

children.name: Ehren Richardson
children.notes: Iraq veteran, college student (as of 2007).

children.name: Daniel Richardson
children.notes: College student (as of 2007).

children.name: Kent Bergum
children.notes: High School Principal.

children.name: Noa Kay Bergum
children.notes: Died 29 February 1997.

children.name: Kelly Gaynor Bergum
children.notes: High School counselor.

children.name: Konval Harlan Bergum
children.notes: District Conservationist (US Soil Conservation Service); Lutheran Brotherhood. 2 daughters.

children.name: Kari Bergum Irber
children.notes: CPA. Married John Irber (b. 10 April 1961, St. Paul MN), 10 June 1989, Hinckley.

children.name: Kathe Bergum Matthews
children.notes: CPA. Married John Matthews (b. 30 May 1961, Minneapolis MN; CPA), 9 November 1991, Hinckley MN.

children.name: Clarence Edward Fortney
children.notes: Worked at General Motors. Married Anna Skreen, 21 August 1918, Wheeler, WI. Wife Anna Skreen born 22 June 1900, Fargo, ND; died 14 November 1990, Houghton Lake, MI.

children.name: Hillman Arnold Fortney
children.notes: Retired. 2 daughters, 2 sons.

children.name: Agnes Marie Fortney
children.notes: 3 daughters.

children.name: Ralph Clarence Fortney
children.notes: Retired. 2 daughters, 1 son.

children.name: Cynthia Diane Fortney
children.notes: Married Lauren Arthur Vaughn (b. 19 Oct 1953, Pontiac MI), 27 July 1996, Traverse City MI.

children.name: Douglas Nelson Fortney
children.notes: Married Christina Sue McCorkle (b. 2 Dec 1965, Lansing MI), 10 June 1989, Lansing MI.

children.name: Oliver John Fortney
children.notes: First married Susana (Suzy) Marie Sjolden (b. 5 May 1913), 21 November 1933. Second married Lilian Gregerson (b. 14 September 1896, d. 18 May 1977), 16 December 1948.

children.name: Michael Dee Fortney
children.notes: 2 daughters.

children.name: Dawn Marie Fortney Maidl
children.notes: Insurance claims examiner. Died 26 June 2004.

children.name: Michelle Ann Fortney Montgomery
children.notes: Claims examiner.

children.name: Henry Martin Fortney
children.notes: Wife Caroline Margaret Smith born 18 May 1913, died 1994. Elementary teacher. Married 23 May 1936, Colfax, WI.

children.name: Christine Ellen Fortney
children.notes: Secretary/Office Worker, then farmer (ret.). Married 1st Ken Faber (4 children), 2nd Rolph Anderson (4 children).

children.name: Karn Louise Fortney
children.notes: Art Teacher (ret.). Married 1st Rick Rock (4 sons), 2nd Orrin Anderson (no children).

children.name: Thomas Frederick Fortney
children.notes: Died young, 1966.

children.name: Thomas Kendahl Fortney
children.notes: Physical education teacher and politician. UW heavyweight wrestler (1928, 1932, 1935, 1938). Died in Detroit in 1944. He and Elsie had no children. Married Elsie Carlson, 5 October 1928, Chicago, IL. Elsie (born 1904, died 1979; nurse) never remarried and kept his photo by her bed the rest of her life.

children.name: Albin Leonard Fortney
children.notes: Chaplain Major, US Army. Served in WWII (Hawaii at Pearl Harbor, later European theater) and Korea. Married Anita Linnea Södergren, 28 May 1935. Died of colonic cancer, 10 days before his 33rd wedding anniversary.

children.name: Alan Jon Fortney
children.notes: Born on the day his father received his army commission. BA University of Wisconsin–Madison (English, 1963); studied at University of Copenhagen (1961–62). Teacher at Southern Vermont College, Bennington College, and Mount Anthony Union High School (retired 2008). Founded Woodlands Pathways (~1992). Published Go Light (Shires Press, 2009). Married Jill Andersen Fortney. Primary compiler of the family history; visited the Forthun farm in 2005.

children.name: Rachael Fortney
children.notes: Adopted daughter of Alan & Jill. Biological father: Joe. Lives in Dana Point, CA (as of 2010). Career in real estate and escrow; holds California Real Estate License.

children.name: Kendall Anders Fortney
children.notes: Artist & filmmaker. Born 5 July 1981. Lives in Burlington, VT. Named for his uncle Kendall Thomas Fortney, KIA Vietnam 1968. Studied Okinawan karate; Vermont Statehouse Page (8th grade). Early interest in public television film production.

children.name: Steven Dale Fortney
children.notes: Author & professor.

children.name: Kendall Thomas Fortney
children.notes: Army medic. KIA Vietnam, 6 February 1968. Initially listed as MIA due to bureaucratic error; identified with help of Senator William Proxmire. Named for his great-uncle Thomas Kendahl Fortney.

children.name: Anita Linnea Fortney
children.notes: Married William Harms. Moved to Muskegon, Michigan.

children.name: Myrtie Susanna Fortney
children.notes: Youngest child of Hans & Maria. Married Andrew Ole Larson of Menomonie, WI. Andrew Ole Larson born 31 May 1908 Menomonie WI, died March 1986 Menomonie WI. Carpenter and teacher. Her five children were Alan's beloved 'Larson cousins.' Cousin Laurel's husband Ollie encountered Kendall Thomas in Vietnam.

children.name: Thomas Andrew Larson
children.notes: Computer data specialist. 1 son.

children.name: Kerry Dean Larson
children.notes: Accountant. Married Betsy Weinhaus (b. 7 Jul 1968), 20 February 1996, Ixtapa, Mexico.

children.name: Mary Ann Larson
children.notes: Nurse. 3 children (divorced).

children.name: Lynn Marie Langford Jones
children.notes: Accountant. Married Jeffrey Jones (b. 16 Mar 1960, Minneapolis MN), 19 Aug 1988. Divorced 2001.

children.name: Laura Beth Langford Walleen
children.notes: Regional human resource manager. Married Richard Walleen (b. 23 Nov 1964), 4 May 1991.

children.name: Jonda Kay Langford Martin
children.notes: Business owner, CEO. Married Daniel Martin (b. 5 Feb 1961), 29 October 1995.

children.name: Linda Rae Larson
children.notes: 4 children.

children.name: Ashley Renee Olson Keith
children.notes: Ryan Keith b. 26 Aug 1972, Rome GA. Teacher.

children.name: Andrea Elizabeth Olson Bach
children.notes: Event management. Married Matthew Bach (b. 7 Feb 1973), 31 July 1995, Bloomington MN.

children.name: Alexi LaRae Olson Thompson
children.notes: Zachary Thompson is a pastor.

children.name: Elise Rae Thompson
children.notes: Newest member of the tribe, born May 2007.

children.name: Orland John Larson
children.notes: 2 sons.

children.name: Laurel Jean Larson
children.notes: Reading teacher (ret.). 3 children. Her husband Ollie encountered Kendall Thomas Fortney in Vietnam.

children.name: Luke Everett Madsen
children.notes: Spanish teacher, varsity coach. Married Jennifer Krenzelok (b. 10 Feb 1973, special ed teacher), 3 August 1996, Grace Lutheran, Eau Claire WI.

children.name: Gabriel Dean Madsen
children.notes: Twin.

children.name: Mason Daniel Madsen
children.notes: Twin.

children.name: Jed Thomas Matthew Madsen
children.notes: Tru-Green Lawn Care manager. Married Cindy Diadoo (b. 30 Jun 1975, environmental health/safety manager), 7 May 2005, Menomonie WI.

children.name: Jesse Jacob Madsen
children.notes: Math teacher, coach. Married Devan Keith (b. 22 Jun 1979), 2 September 2003, Fresno CA.

children.name: Rev. Carl Johannes Södergren
children.notes: Lutheran minister. Father of six children, including Anita Linnea. Family deeply rooted in Lutheran ministry.

children.name: Anita Linnea Södergren
children.notes: Born in Moline, IL; family moved to Burlington, IA. Married Albin Leonard Fortney, 28 May 1935, Minneapolis. Died 4 July 1990, before breakfast, in Skaalen Home after 22 years as a widow. Mother of four.

children.name: Una Elizabeth Södergren
children.notes: Married John Milton MD.

children.name: Rev. Carl Wendell Södergren
children.notes: Lutheran minister. Married Eunice. Anita's family stayed near him in Portland, OR during WWII.

children.name: Phoebe Echo Södergren
children.notes: Married Clifford (Johnson) Kent. Her comment about a non-laying chicken — "Now that's what I call a dumb cluck" — became a family legend.

children.name: Mulhearn / O'Brien Branch
children.subtitle: Irish Origins · County Roscommon / Clare / Donegal · Newark, New Jersey

children.name: William Mulhearn
children.notes: Emigrated from Ireland (County Clare / County Roscommon area) to Newark, New Jersey, arriving 1880s via Castle Garden, New York (the precursor to Ellis Island). Castle Garden records were later destroyed by fire. His son Robert Mulhearn Sr. was born in the United States.

children.name: Robert Mulhearn Sr.
children.notes: Son of William Mulhearn. Different middle initial from his son Robert Jr. Married Sarah Gans, an Austrian Jewish immigrant born in the United States. Further details to be confirmed from family records.

children.name: Robert Mulhearn
children.notes: Born in Newark, New Jersey. Son of Robert Mulhearn Sr. and Sarah Gans. Married Agnes McEntee. Together had ten children. The American Mulhearn family descends from this couple.

children.name: Shirley Mulhearn
children.notes: Born 20 April 1922, New Jersey. Fifth child of Robert and Agnes Mulhearn. Married Andrew B. Andersen II in 1948; together had six children including Jill Andersen Fortney. Died 4 March 1994, New Jersey. Buried in Veterans Cemetery, New Jersey. She was in the Women's Auxiliary Corps during World War II, where she met Andrew.

children.name: Teeo (Lawrence) D'Alessio
children.notes: Oldest child of Andrew B. Andersen II and Shirley Mulhearn. Lives in McKinney, Texas. Children: Lori (m. Billy Lunz → Olivia, Kellen); Jeffrey D'Alessio (m. Suzanne → Julia, Amanda, Michael).

children.name: Jeffrey Andersen
children.notes: Son of Andrew B. Andersen II and Shirley Mulhearn. Lives in Rockwall, Texas. Child: Todd (→ Zachary).

children.name: Gregory Andersen
children.notes: Son of Andrew B. Andersen II and Shirley Mulhearn. Lives in Roseburg, Oregon. Married Ginny. Child: Erin Andersen (→ Kylie).

children.name: Jill Andersen Fortney
children.notes: Born 15 June 1951. Art teacher and sixth-grade teacher in Bennington, VT schools. BS Summa Cum Laude, North Adams State College (1978). Married Alan Jon Fortney. Photographer — Forthun village photos were taken by Jill during the 2005 Norway trip. Children: Rachael Fortney (Dana Point, CA) and Kendall Fortney (Burlington, VT).

children.name: Judi Andersen
children.notes: Daughter of Andrew B. Andersen II and Shirley Mulhearn. Lives in Cheektowaga, New York. Married Pat Thompson. Child: Rebecca (m. Patrick Lonzi → Jordan, Aiden).

children.name: Andrew B. Andersen III
children.notes: Youngest son of Andrew B. Andersen II and Shirley Mulhearn.

children.name: Agnes McEntee ('Nanny Agnes')
children.notes: Born in Newark, New Jersey. Married Robert Mulhearn; together had ten children. Daughter of [McEntee] and [O'Brien], both born in the United States. The McEntee line (Gaelic: Mac an tSaoi, "Son of the Scholar") traces to County Donegal, Ireland. The O'Brien line descends from Brian Boru, King of Thomond.

children.name: Ole Andersen
children.notes: Father of Andrew Bernard Andersen Sr. From the Kragerø area of Norway. His wife (maiden name Mortland) came from a neighboring town.

children.name: Andrew Bernard Andersen Sr.
children.notes: Emigrated from Krageroe, Norway to Holland, Michigan in 1914, through Ellis Island, New York. Son of Ole Andersen and [Mortland], who came from a neighboring town in Norway. Married Guerena Knutson, born in Wisconsin of Norwegian immigrant parents. Father of Andrew B. Andersen II (born 1918 in Michigan).

children.name: Andrew B. Andersen II
children.notes: Born 7 August 1918, Michigan. Son of Andrew Bernard Andersen Sr. and Guerena Knutson. Married Shirley Mulhearn in 1948. Father of six children including Jill Andersen Fortney. Served in World War II with post-Normandy forces in Paris; met Shirley in England just before his unit was moved to France — she was in the Women's Auxiliary Corps. Died in Texas. Death year uncertain (possibly 1960 or 1990 — to be confirmed from family records).

children.name: Guerena Knutson Andersen
children.notes: Wife of Andrew Bernard Andersen Sr. Born in Wisconsin. Her parents emigrated from Norway to Wisconsin the generation before her. Further ancestry not yet documented.
